_setup: WordPress MCP uses the canonical WordPress/mcp-adapter plugin (v0.5.0+, WP >=6.9, PHP >=7.4) bridged by @automattic/mcp-wordpress-remote (verified 2026-06). Prerequisites before this server connects: (1) install + activate the WordPress/mcp-adapter plugin on the site; (2) create a dedicated LEAST-PRIVILEGE WordPress user named {{MCP_USER}} and generate an Application Password for it; (3) export WP_MCP_APP_PASSWORD in your shell or untracked .env (NEVER commit it). For no-Docker, replace the {{SLUG}}.ddev.site host in WP_API_URL with your local site URL. The MCP client acts AS this WordPress user, so its role/capabilities ARE the security boundary — keep them minimal (read/edit content only).
